sql_array: CREATE TABLE timestamps (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, event_time TIMESTAMPTZ);
INSERT INTO timestamps (id, event_time) VALUES (1, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-05 12:00:00'), (2, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-06 14:30:00');
UPDATE timestamps SET event_time = GREATEST(event_time, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-07 15:45:00') WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, GREATEST(event_time, TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-06 16:00:00') AS latest_event FROM timestamps;
DELETE FROM timestamps WHERE event_time < GREATEST(TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-05 13:00:00', TIMESTAMPTZ '2023-10-05 14:00:00');
